---
title: "Karl Marx’ Oekonomische Lehren / The Economic Doctrines of Karl Marx"
---

Karl Kautsky, *Karl Marx’ Oekonomische Lehren. Gemeinverständlich dargestellt
und erläutert* (1886) — a complete, unabridged parallel German/English
edition.

Written to make the economic theory of Marx's *Capital* accessible to a broad
working-class readership, the book became the most widely read introduction to
Marxist economics of its era. The German text follows the Marxists Internet
Archive transcription of the 14th edition (Verlag von J. H. W. Dietz Nachf.,
Stuttgart 1912). The English translation is new.

Begin with the [Preface to the First Edition](chapters/vorwort1.qmd), or go
straight to [Chapter 1. The Commodity](chapters/ab1-kap1.qmd).
